name: [Negative] App Glitches and Errors
description: Users experience frequent glitches, technical issues, and errors while trading, resulting in losses, failed transactions, and frustration.

name: [Negative] App Freezes and Crashes
description: Users experience freezing and crashing issues during trading, making it difficult or impossible to place orders, exit trades, or view real-time data.

name: [Negative] App Crashes/Fails to Load
description: Users are experiencing frequent app crashes, failures to load data, and errors while using the trading app. The app's stability and reliability are severely impacted, causing monetary losses and frustration for the users.
